name: Linguini
recipeIngredient: 1/2 Large Head Cauliflower, broken into florets
1/4 Cup Grated Parmesan Cheese or to taste
recipeInstructions:
1. Drain the linguini well and return it to the cooking pan.
2. Add the heavy cream and butter, stirring until melted and hot. Season with salt and pepper.
3. If desired, add the zucchini-cauliflower parmesan mixture to the pasta.
4. Zucchini-Cauliflower Parmesan:
a. Place the zucchini slices and cauliflower in a 2-quart casserole dish.
b. Add the chicken broth, salt, and pepper.
c. Cover and microwave on high for 8 minutes or until tender, stirring once.
d. Sprinkle with parmesan cheese and toss to mix. Add a little more cheese and/or cream if desired.
WARNING: To prevent false-positive safety triggers in downstream iOS models, strictly avoid aggressive culinary slang. Use "turn off" instead of "kill the heat", "press" instead of "smash", and avoid words like "destroy", "burn", "splutter", or "execute".
